user_query:
I need you to manage this as a small project using a file-based planning workflow with three working-memory files. Please do the following:

1) Read both input files to understand the brief and constraints:
- input/brief.md
- input/constraints.yaml

2) Treat output/ as the project directory for this task. Create and maintain these planning files under output/ throughout your work:
- output/task_plan.md — the master plan with phases and status
- output/findings.md — discoveries, extracted requirements, and decisions from the inputs
- output/progress.md — session log of actions taken, tests, and errors

3) Structure the plan with at least 5 distinct phases (e.g., Requirements & Discovery; Planning & Structure; Drafting; Review & Verification; Delivery). Mark each phase with a line like "**Status:** pending | in_progress | complete" and, by the end, ensure all 5+ phases are marked complete in output/task_plan.md. Include a "## Decisions Made" table with at least 2 entries and a "## Errors Encountered" table with at least 1 entry.

4) Use output/findings.md to capture extracted requirements and constraints from the input files. Do not duplicate all details in the plan—keep research/inputs summarized in findings.md, and reference them from the plan as needed.

5) Create a concise project deliverable under output/: output/project_charter.md containing these sections: "## Title", "## Goals", "## Constraints", and "## Milestones". Include at least 3 milestones as bullet points.

6) Log your work in output/progress.md with a "## Session:" header and an "### Actions Taken" section that lists at least 5 concrete actions you performed (bulleted). Also include an "### Errors" section and record at least one error you encountered (you may simulate a minor issue, e.g., a missing file that you then resolve) and how you addressed it.

7) By the end, ensure the planning files reflect that all phases are complete and that the project_charter.md is finalized and consistent with the brief and constraints.
